criteria.reason: Controlled production-runtime smoke completed sourcing, approvals, queued_not_dispatched handoff, and fixture cleanup.

commands_run: cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose exec -T app sh -lc 'SMOKE_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000 PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=/app/src python3 -B /tmp/smoke_agent_blueprint_outreach_api.py'
cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose exec -T app sh -lc '<cleanup verification query>'
cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose logs --since 5m app | tail -120
